summary: Replaced the large Live Games section with a compact horizontal games ticker.
Updated renderGames() to emit small score chips instead of full scoreboard cards, with subtle green accenting for live games.
result: Dashboard server started successfully after the games ticker rewrite.
Games now render as compact chips and no full game cards remain in the dashboard template.
risks: HANDOFF_DASH_003.md was missing, so implementation followed TASK_DASH_003.json only.
Browser visual verification was not performed from here; verification was limited to successful startup and template inspection.
